2301290.name: Sass VS Fash - Donation DLC
2301290.description:
Sass VS Fash: Girlballs of Steel is a game that's currently under development, and in order to properly continue development, JMAA GAMES must ensure it gets enough funding for such.

This DLC contains a bit of extra content for the game at the time being, such as exclusive concept art and a sneak peek into the game's soundtrack, and it is a way for players to ensure they can help contribute a little extra for the development of Sass VS Fash.
2301290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
